query: 单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：

decision.archive_summary: The conversation narrowed from generic testing claims to a concrete VS Code requirement: the user wants context-size visibility shown directly from the status-bar workflow, auto-updating without manual refresh or commands, optionally via editor/terminal/tail-style live display. A later clarification established a strict boundary: this must be implemented separately and must not touch Project Assistant. The assistant then stated it had created an independent VS Code extension and reverted the earlier Project Assistant linkage.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same active task, so relation=continue. The next turn is likely to depend on the unresolved implementation state and requirement history around live context-size display plus the explicit boundary against Project Assistant. Early testing chatter is resolved and irrelevant, so t1-t2 can leave. t7 is just a short acknowledgment with no standalone value. The durable requirements in t3 and t5, and the hard constraint in t11, should survive as semantic pins even if older raw turns are later compacted.
